source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The Lewis diagram of the bisulfite ion, $HSO^{3-}$, is drawn below. Which of the following descriptions correctly compares the bond lengths of the three sulfur-oxygen bonds found in bisulfite?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Of the three bonds, there is one longer one and two shorter ones of identical length.

choice_map.A: All bonds are the same length.
choice_map.B: Of the three bonds, there is one longer one and two shorter ones of identical length.
choice_map.C: Of the three bonds, there are two longer ones of identical length and one shorter one.
choice_map.D: All three bonds are different lengths.

extraction_notes: answer is stored as numeric index "1", but the record does not explicitly specify whether the indexing is 0-based or 1-based
image field contains an inline PIL image descriptor rather than a path or URL
source_intake_record.subject: Chemistry

issues: metadata.extraction_notes states the original answer was stored as numeric index "1" without explicit 0-based or 1-based indexing.
metadata.extraction_notes states the source image field contained an inline PIL image descriptor rather than a direct path or URL.
metadata.image_paths is empty even though a top-level image_paths entry is provided.

image_dependency: 题干显式说明“The Lewis diagram ... is drawn below”，判断依赖所示结构图。
输入字段 `requires_image=true` 且 `text_dominant=false`，表明图像不是可有可无的辅助信息。
要比较三条 S-O 键长，需要从图中读取具体成键方式与连结关系，单靠答案选项不足以完成。
multi_step: 需要先从 Lewis 图识别三条 S-O 键的类型/等价关系，再比较键长对应到选项。
该题不是纯视觉定位，还涉及化学中的共振或键级判断，因此至少包含图像读取加概念推断两步。
但答案是四选一，推理链较短，计算量不大，因此多步程度中等而非很高。
verifiability: 题目为封闭式选择题，提供了 4 个明确选项，标准答案文本与选项 B 完全对应。
答案形式清晰，可直接核对 `answer_text` 是否匹配某个 choice，易于规则化验证。
`registry_passed=true`，且题干、图片、答案都已登记存在，支持后续核验。
不过登记问题中提到原始答案曾以数字索引存储，存在轻微信息抽取风险，因此不打满分。
